comments.body: @nalind PTAL.  I just noted that in the changelog for v1.13.1 I'd entries for both 1.13.0 AND 1.13.1 in there.  Ditto the buildah.spec.  That probably was an indicator of things going bad last time.  Then today in the 1.13.2 changelog.txt that was auto-generated, I'd entries for 1.13.0, 1.13.1 and the new 1.13.2 glommed together under 1.13.2 before I edited.   I've adjusted all of that in this PR.
